overview: A comprehensive multi-step alumni feedback form for collecting structured feedback from alumni, with an admin dashboard featuring Google Gemini AI-powered analysis and editable IQAC action tracking.
features: Multi-step feedback form (Registration, Curriculum, Teaching & Learning)
Conditional fields based on employment/study status
Department selection for UG, PG, and M.Phil
Submissions table with individual detail views
IQAC action table with permanently saved editable fields
